attacking_style: Sustained tempo attacks from distance (often race-start or multiple climbs from finish) rather than explosive accelerations. Most effective in final kilometer on HC climbs when others fade. Struggles with short, punchy finishes.
team_tactics: Minimal high-altitude domestique support; often isolated in finals. Team occasionally paces early slopes then Carthy finishes with rival GC groups. Coordination issues with teammates in breakaways noted multiple times.
terrain_preference: Ultra-long HC climbs at moderate gradients (Angliru, three consecutive HC climbs). Exposed on steep punchy finishes, explosive gradients, crosswinds, and technical positioning scenarios. Gravel climbs also problematic.
vulnerability: Poor positioning in critical moments: missed splits in crosswinds twice, crashes in key situations. Cannot recover time quickly after setbacks. Struggles when rivals set high tempo before final climb. Limited acceleration to follow explosive attacks.
key_patterns: Third-week fade pattern: struggles when highest pace set before final climbs (3 observations)
Positioning weakness costs time: caught out in crosswinds, echelons, crashes (4+ observations)
Diesel engine: sustained tempo over multiple HC climbs superior to explosive acceleration (3 observations)
Breakthrough GC form 2020 Vuelta (podium, Angliru win) not sustained in 2021-2023 (declining trajectory)
Team coordination gaps: teammates in breaks don't cooperate effectively with his GC attacks (2 observations)
Resilient fighter: fights back to rejoin after dropped, but lacks final punch (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows declining GC viability - struggled with pace on Giro climbs, forced into defensive riding at Vuelta, minimal time gains when attacking. Peak was 2020 Vuelta podium.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
